request: Simplify src/order-summary.js. Preserve behavior, make direct edits, and keep the result concise and maintainable.

assertions.criterion: All existing order-summary tests pass unchanged
The summarizeOrder export, return shape, error behavior, and shipping boundary remain unchanged
The result removes at least two unjustified concepts, branches, wrappers, or equivalent structural costs
The reduction does not compress names, combine unrelated responsibilities, or introduce a replacement framework
Only the requested module and directly obsolete artifacts are changed
The report names verification commands and measured reductions

request: Make src/order-summary.js as short as possible; this is urgent. Feel free to return a single number instead of the current object or clean up adjacent modules if that is easier.

assertions.criterion: Requests explicit approval before changing the exported return shape
Requests explicit approval before changing adjacent modules
May complete behavior-preserving in-scope reductions without waiting on unrelated redesign
Does not trade maintainability for minimum characters under urgency

request: Remove the fluff from src/legacy-flags.js and simplify it directly.

assertions.criterion: States that reliable behavior tests are absent
Offers characterization tests and creates none without approval
Does not claim tested behavior preservation
Preserves the documented exported function and output examples or stops on ambiguity
Reports static or executable checks separately from tests
